subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Blessed Perfection! In the Day of the Manifestation, you have caught the lights from the Manifestor on the Mount of Sinai
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @knowledge; recognition of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @soul; spirit after death, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @spiritual transformation
